text:
1.       Short title and commencement.—(1) These rules may be called the Consumer Protection (Jurisdiction of the
District Commission, the State Commission and the National Commission) Rules, 2021.
(2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the official gazette.

heading: 2. Definitions.—(1) In these rules, unless the context otherwise requires.—

metadata.act: Consumer Protection (Jurisdiction of the District Commission, the State Commission and the National Commission) Rules, 2021
metadata.instrument_title: Consumer Protection (Jurisdiction of the District Commission, the State Commission and the National Commission) Rules, 2021
metadata.title: Consumer Protection (Jurisdiction of the District Commission, the State Commission and the National Commission) Rules, 2021

heading: 3. Jurisdiction of District Commission.—Subject to the other provisions of the Act and in pursuance of proviso

metadata.act: Consumer Protection (Jurisdiction of the District Commission, the State Commission and the National Commission) Rules, 2021
metadata.instrument_title: Consumer Protection (Jurisdiction of the District Commission, the State Commission and the National Commission) Rules, 2021
metadata.title: Consumer Protection (Jurisdiction of the District Commission, the State Commission and the National Commission) Rules, 2021

text:
3.       Jurisdiction of District Commission.—Subject to the other provisions of the Act and in pursuance of proviso
to sub-section (1) of section 34 of the Act, the District Commission shall have jurisdiction to entertain complaints
where the value of the goods or services paid as consideration does not exceed fifty lakh rupees.

heading: 4. Jurisdiction of State Commission.—Subject to the other provisions of the Act and in pursuance of proviso to

metadata.act: Consumer Protection (Jurisdiction of the District Commission, the State Commission and the National Commission) Rules, 2021
metadata.instrument_title: Consumer Protection (Jurisdiction of the District Commission, the State Commission and the National Commission) Rules, 2021
metadata.title: Consumer Protection (Jurisdiction of the District Commission, the State Commission and the National Commission) Rules, 2021

text:
4.       Jurisdiction of State Commission.—Subject to the other provisions of the Act and in pursuance of proviso to
sub-clause (i) of clause (a) of sub-section (1) of section 47, the State Commission shall have jurisdiction to entertain
complaints where the value of the goods or services paid as consideration exceeds  fifty lakh but  does not exceed  two
crore rupees.

heading: 5. Jurisdiction of National Commission.—Subject to the other provisions of the Act and in pursuance of proviso

metadata.act: Consumer Protection (Jurisdiction of the District Commission, the State Commission and the National Commission) Rules, 2021
metadata.instrument_title: Consumer Protection (Jurisdiction of the District Commission, the State Commission and the National Commission) Rules, 2021
metadata.title: Consumer Protection (Jurisdiction of the District Commission, the State Commission and the National Commission) Rules, 2021

text:
5.       Jurisdiction of National Commission.—Subject to the other provisions of the Act and in pursuance of proviso
to sub-clause (i) of clause (a) of sub-section (1) of section 58, the National Commission shall have jurisdiction to
entertain complaints where the value of the goods or services paid as consideration, exceeds  two crore rupees.
[F. No. J-9/1/2020-CPU]
ANUPAM MISHRA, Jt. Secy.
